stemHtml: Departing SID requires 6.1% gradient with T/O flaps, speed 130 kts to 1800 ft and thereafter a 5% gradient to FL80 clean at 230 kts. What is the ROC required to 1800 ft?

options.a: 800 fpm to 1800 ft with non-standard speed change altitude.
options.b: 1150 fpm with standard speed change altitude.
options.c: 1250 fpm with standard speed change altitude.
options.d: 600 fpm to 1800 ft with non-standard speed change altitude.
